query:
SELECT c.external_id, c.status, 
       SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as pt_total,
       COUNT(pt.id) as pt_count
FROM contracts c
JOIN payment_transactions pt ON pt.section = c.section AND pt.contract_external_id = c.external_id
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.external_id IN ('19654','809','16402','17783','8612','22830','19913','9419')
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
    WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365' AND dcc.contract_external_id = c.external_id
  )
GROUP BY c.external_id, c.status
ORDER BY c.external_id;
